docket_entries.description: PLAN I STATUS CONFERENCE DATE: HEARING SET FOR JAN-11-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-25-2002 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN PROOF OF SERVICE, AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JAN-11-2002 STATUS CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $350.00 AGAINST PAUL A HARRELL, ESQ., FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: FEB-25-2002, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE MAR-12-2002. PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY: MARY J. HINDS. (212) NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-25-2002 CONTINUED TO APR-29-2002 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
